# Stock Storage Type

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:e399cf789334f8e78223fc82eabd3104e83b7b6978f7e9e70b62cc8a5d436fdc
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module introduces two new models in order to manage stock moves with

: packages according to the packaging and stock location properties.

- Stock package storage type (`stock.package.storage.type`)

  This model is linked to product.packaging and defines the type of storage
  related to a specific packaging.

- Stock location storage type (`stock.location.storage.type`)

  This models is linked to stock.location and defines the types of storage
  that are allowed for a specific location.

Therefore a Stock location storage type can include different Stock package
storage type in order to validate the destination of a move with package into a
stock location.
Moreover Stock location storage type can include product, size or lot
restrictions for the stock locations it's defined on, so that a move with
package will only be allowed if it doesn't violate the restrictions defined
(cf stock_location_storage_type_strategy).

Moreover, this module implements "storage type put-away strategy" in order to compute a
put-away location using storage types.

The standard put-away strategy is applied *before* the storage type put-away
strategy as the former relies on product or product category and the latter
relies on stock packages.

In other words, when a move is assigned, Odoo standard put-away strategy will be
applied to compute a new destination on the stock move lines, according to the
product.
After this first "put-away computation", the "storage type" put-away strategy
is applied, if the reserved quant is linked to a package defining a package
storage type.

Storage locations linked to the package storage are processed sequentially, if
said storage location is a child of the move line's destination location (i.e
either the put-away location or the move's destination location).
For each location, their packs storage strategy is applied as well as the
restrictions defined on the stock location storage types.
If no suitable location is found, the next location in the sequence will be
searched and so on.

For the packs putaway strategy "none", the location is considered as is.  For
the "ordered children" strategy, children locations are sorted by first by max
height which is a physical constraint to respect, then pack putaway sequence
which allow to favor for example some level or corridor, and finally by name.

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Known issues / Roadmap

Currently, the module supports only strategies applied on packages (`stock.quant.package`).
For implementations that do not use packages, it would be possible to add
compatibility with product packaging.

The information needed from a package are:

- the storage type, to know which strategy is applied
- the dimensions and weight, to apply constraints

If we want to support product packaging, we would need to:

- guess the product packaging of a move line based on the product and quantities
  (multiple of a packaging quantity, for instance 8000 would be a pallet if the pallet
  has 2000 units, 1900 would be Box if the Box has 100 units)
- from the product packaging, we know the storage type and dimensions

Everywhere the module is using `package_id`, we would have to check this:

- use the package if a package is set
- else, use the computed packaging

About Unit of Measures:

In v13, there is an assumption of height to be expressed in mm and weight in kg.
In v14, packaging can be expressed in differents units. Explicit fields are introduced
like max_weight_in_kg in order make simple and efficient computations.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location_storage_type.StockLocationStorageType._domain_location_storage_type
documentation:
compute a domain which applies the constraint of the
stock.location.storage.type to select locations among candidate
locations.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_storage_location_sequence_cond.StockStorageLocationSequenceCond._get_code_snippet_eval_context
documentation:
Prepare the context used when evaluating python code
:returns: dict -- evaluation context given to safe_eval

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_quant.StockQuant._check_storage_type
documentation:
Check if at least one location storage type allows the package storage
type into the quant's location

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.tests.test_auto_assign_storage_type.TestAutoAssignStorageType.test_auto_assign_package_storage_type_without_packaging_id
documentation:
Packages without `packaging_id` are internal packages and they
are intended to be stored in the warehouse.
On such packages storage type is automatically defined.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.tests.test_auto_assign_storage_type.TestAutoAssignStorageType.test_auto_assign_package_storage_type_with_packaging_id
documentation:
Packages with `packaging_id` are delivery packages and they are not
intended to be stored in the warehouse.
On such packages storage type is not set.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location.StockLocation._compute_leaf_location_ids
documentation: Compute all children leaf locations. Current location is excluded (not a child)

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location.StockLocation._compute_max_height
documentation:
Get the max height supported by location types, knowing that a max
height of 0 means 'no limit', so it's considered as the maximum value.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location.StockLocation._get_product_putaway
documentation:
Returns the direct location where the product has to be put if
found Otherwise returns an empty recordset..

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location.StockLocation._get_sorted_leaf_locations_orderby
documentation:
Return SQL orderby clause and params for sorting locations

First, locations are ordered by max height, knowing that a max height of 0
means "no limit" and as such it should be among the last locations.
Then, they are ordered by a sequence and name.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location.StockLocation._get_sorted_leaf_child_locations
documentation:
Return sorted leaf sub-locations

The locations are candidate locations that will be evaluated one per
one in order to find the first available location. They must be leaf
locations where we can actually put goods.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location.StockLocation._domain_location_storage_type_constraints
documentation:
Compute the domain for the location storage type which match the package
storage type

This method also checks the "capacity" constraints (height and weight)

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location.StockLocation._select_final_valid_putaway_locations
documentation:
Return the valid locations using the provided limit

`self` contains locations already ordered and contains
only valid locations.
This method can be used as a hook to add or remove valid
locations based on other properties. Pay attention to
keep the order.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location.StockLocation.select_allowed_locations
documentation:
Filter allowed locations for a storage type

`self` contains locations already ordered according to the
putaway strategy, so beware of the return that must keep the
same order

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.models.stock_location.StockLocation._order_allowed_locations
documentation:
Return the ordered list of valid_locations

By default the order should be the same as self. However, if the
valid_locations list contains locations configured to not mix products,
we must give priority to locations that already contains products
(the ones with less qty first)

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.tests.test_storage_type_putaway_strategy.TestPutawayStorageTypeStrategy.test_storage_strategy_none_in_sequence
documentation:
When a location has a strategy 'none' in sequence, stop

We can use it to stop computing the put-away when the destination
location match, for instance to use a setup with a sequence:

1. Stock: None
2. Stock/Cardboxes Reserve: ordered locations

If a move is created with destination 'Cardboxes Reserve', the put-away
rule stops at the rule 1. so the move stays in 'Cardboxes Reserve.
Then, the destination is changed to 'Stock/Cardboxes Reserve' and
a recomputation is done, the put-away for Bin 1 is applied.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.tests.test_storage_type_putaway_strategy.TestPutawayStorageTypeStrategy.test_storage_strategy_do_not_mix_products_reuse_location
documentation:
Location with restriction 'do_not_mix_products' should have priority

When locations are configured with 'do_not_mix_products' the strategy
must give priority to location that already contains the product
(less qty first).

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.tests.test_storage_type_putaway_strategy.TestPutawayStorageTypeStrategy.test_storage_strategy_none_in_sequence_to_fixes
documentation:
When a location has a strategy 'none' in sequence, stop

We can use it to stop computing the put-away when the destination
location match, In such a case, if the location match and a putaway
rule is defined on the product for this destination location,
the location destination will be the location from the putaway rule.

This is very usefull to support fixed location putaway

Ex:
product putaway:
* in: Cardboxes
* out: cardboxes_bin_4_location

sequence:
1. Stock/Cardboxes: None

If a move is created with destination "Stock", the put-away rule stops
at sequence 1. Since a put away exists on the product for 'Cardboxes',
the product putaway is applied and the final destination is
'cardboxes_bin_4_location'

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_storage_type.tests.test_storage_type_putaway_strategy.TestPutawayStorageTypeStrategy.test_storage_strategy_sequence_condition
documentation: If a condition is not met on storage location sequence, it's ignored
